caption: A man with white hair wearing a light blue button-down shirt stands behind a podium, delivering a presentation in a room with wood-paneled walls and vertical blinds. An audience is seated in front of him, with several individuals visible from the back, including a woman in a blue and red patterned shirt, a man in a maroon shirt, and a woman with white hair wearing a yellow shirt. A black speaker is mounted on the wall to the left of the speaker. In the lower right corner of the scene, the white text "ORCA" is clearly visible. Throughout the sequence, the speaker remains at the podium, gesturing slightly with his hands as he talks, while the audience members remain seated and attentive. There is very little movement between the frames, as the camera maintains a static wide shot of the presentation.
